title: Flaky Comforting Canadian Beef Poutine
description: A Canadian classic featuring ground beef, flaky pastry, and a side of comforting cheese curds. This flexible recipe makes it suitable for a range of diets, including vegetarian and vegan options.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use a flaky sea salt for best results.

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: Use ice-cold water for flaky pastry.

ingredients.name: Ground beef
ingredients.notes: Use a mix of chuck and brisket for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Clove
ingredients.notes: Just a hint of warm spice.

ingredients.name: Shio-koji
ingredients.notes: Use a Japanese-style koji powder for added depth.

ingredients.name: Grated cheese
ingredients.notes: Choose a firm Canadian cheese like cheddar or mozzarella.

ingredients.name: Gravy
ingredients.notes: Use store-bought or homemade gravy mix.

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, and salt. Mix until just combined.
